stakeholders.Role: Leading financial services group in Asia, committed to sustainability and responsible banking.

stakeholders.Role: Develops financial crime compliance activities and monitors financial crimes within the group.

Source metadata.evidence_translated: Our Group Financial Crime and Security Services team (Group FCSS) is responsible for and oversees the financial crime compliance activities for the Group, including fraud investigations and financial crime advisory.

stakeholders.Role: Initiates and leads projects such as Project MindForge to develop frameworks for the responsible use of Generative AI in the financial services sector.

stakeholders.Role: Partnered to donate care packs during COVID-19
